chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.Misc.A.No.S-238 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on M.A.No.4191/2024 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection. 03. For orders on M.A.No.4192/2024 (E/A). 04. For the hearing of the main case. 29.07.2024. Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the applicant. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Over-ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Based on an allegation of mischief, the applicant by making an application u/s.22-A/B Cr.PC, he sought direction against the SHO, P.S Rustam Shikarpur, to record his FIR; it was dismissed by learned Sessions Judge/Ex-officio Justice of Peace, Shikarpur, vide order dated 27.06.2024, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant Cr.Misc.Application. After arguing the instant Cr.Misc.Application at some length, it was stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Cr.Misc.Application before this Court on merit, provided the applicant is permitted to exhaust his remedy before the Court having jurisdiction in terms of Section 200 Cr.PC. Order accordingly. JUDGE
